title: Flaky Russian Potato Crumble
description: A solo-dinner dish featuring fermented potato crumbles that are crispy and flaky, perfect for a light meal or snack.
instructions: Peel the potatoes, cut them into small cubes, and place in a large bowl.
In another container, combine yogurt or sour milk with salt. Pour this mixture over the cubed potatoes, ensuring all pieces are coated evenly.
Cover the container and refrigerate for at least 24 hours to ferment.
After fermentation, drain the liquid from the potatoes, then dry them on a clean kitchen towel or paper towels.
Dust the fermented potato cubes with flour and press gently into a flat shape. Place these in the preheated air fryer basket.
Spray the potato surfaces lightly with cooking spray or brush on butter/oil mixture evenly over the surface of the potatoes.
Cook for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and crispy, flipping halfway through cooking time.
Serve immediately as a snack or light meal. Enjoy!
